message:
feat(wezterm): Cx-first list_panes_with_cx entry point (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds `WeztermHandle::list_panes_with_cx` — the first Cx-first entry
point on the WezTerm backend adapter. Leverages the pre-existing
`MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx` from earlier ticks so the mux-pool
fast path (used by snapshot engine, watchdog, native-events,
discovery loop) propagates caller Cx through to the direct socket
call.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+60 lines)

   Adds `WeztermHandle::list_panes_with_cx(cx: &Cx)` with two cfg-gated
   variants:

     a. `#[cfg(all(feature = "vendored", unix, feature = "asupersync-runtime"))]`
        — the production-critical variant. Calls
        `pool.list_panes_with_cx(cx)` instead of `pool.list_panes()`.
        Mux circuit guard / success / failure accounting preserved
        identically. CLI fallback delegates to the legacy
        `list_panes()` since the retry helper's internal sleep
        between attempts is still ambient-Cx — threading Cx through
        the whole retry/circuit-breaker stack is a wider structural
        refactor that would affect every WeztermHandle async method
        and is out of scope for this slice.

     b. `#[cfg(all(feature = "asupersync-runtime", not(all(feature = "vendored", unix))))]`
        — stub variant that just calls `list_panes()`. Keeps the
        Cx-first API surface available on non-vendored builds so
        downstream code can call it unconditionally.

   Legacy `list_panes` is preserved; strictly additive.

Impact: the mux-pool fast path — which is the common case for all
production WeztermHandle consumers — is now fully Cx-first from
the caller's `&Cx` through the `MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx` down
to the underlying `DirectMuxClient::list_panes_with_cx`. The CLI
fallback path remains ambient-Cx, consistent with the partial
migration seam noted in AGENTS.md.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib: pass
  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
    (no new tests — covered by the pre-existing
    MuxPool::list_panes_with_cx LabRuntime tests)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. First WeztermHandle method
gains a Cx-first entry; the remaining 20+ async methods
(get_pane, get_text, send_text, spawn, activate_pane, etc.) can
follow the same pattern mechanically as a follow-up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
